Re=["O","B","A","F","G","K","M"],Wt={O:[16,60],B:[2.1,16],A:[1.4,2.1],F:[1.04,1.4],G:[.79,1.04],K:[.45,.79],M:[.08,.45]},Rt={O:[3e4,5e5],B:[25,3e4],A:[5,25],F:[1.5,5],G:[.6,1.5],K:[.08,.6],M:[.001,.08]};function ue(){return Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1}function ie(){return ue()+ue()}function U(e,t){return e+Math.random()*(t-e)}function Fe(e,t){return Math.floor(Math.random()*(t-e+1))+e}function _e(){const e=Re[Fe(0,Re.length-1)],t=Fe(0,9),[n,i]=Wt[e],a=U(n,i),[r,o]=Rt[e],s=U(r,o);return{class:e,grade:t,mass:a,luminosity:s}}function Ne(e,t){const n=t*.4,i=t*.8,a=t*1.2,r=t*4.85;return e<=n?"Infernal":e<=i?"Hot":e<=a?"Conservative":e<=r?"Cold":"Outer"}function Ft(e){const t=ie();return e==="Infernal"?t<=4?"dwarf":t<=6?"terrestrial":t<=8?"ice":"gas":e==="Hot"?t<=5?"dwarf":t<=9?"terrestrial":t<=10?"ice":"gas":e==="Conservative"?t<=4?"dwarf":t<=10?"terrestrial":t<=11?"ice":"gas":e==="Cold"?t<=5?"dwarf":t<=7?"terrestrial":t<=10?"ice":"gas":t<=4?"dwarf":t<=5?"terrestrial":t<=9?"ice":"gas"}function _t(e){switch(e){case"dwarf":return U(.001,.1);case"terrestrial":return U(.1,2.5);case"ice":return U(.05,.5);case"gas":return U(10,300)}}function Nt(){const e=ue();return e<=2?1:e<=3?2:e<=4?3:e<=5?4:5}function zt(){const e=_e(),t=Math.sqrt(e.luminosity),n=Math.max(0,ie()-8),i=[];for(let h=0;hMath.abs(y-h)<.05)}for(let h=0;hNe(h.distanceAU,t)==="Conservative");if(p)l={type:"Terrestrial",distanceAU:p.distanceAU,massEM:p.mass};else if(m.length>0){const h=m[Math.floor(Math.random()*m.length)];l={type:"Terrestrial",distanceAU:h.distanceAU,massEM:h.mass}}else if(s.length>0){const h=s[Math.floor(Math.random()*s.length)];l={type:"Dwarf",distanceAU:h.distanceAU,massEM:h.mass}}return{starSystem:{key:Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10),primaryStar:{class:e.class,grade:e.grade,mass:e.mass},companionStars:i,circumstellarDisks:r,dwarfPlanets:s,terrestrialWorlds:m,iceWorlds:c,gasWorlds:f,mainWorld:l},starfieldSeed:Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,10).toUpperCase(),epoch:{year:2300,month:1,day:1}}}const he="1.11-dirty",de="1.11-705c34a-dirty";function jt(e,t,n){const i=e.toDataURL("image/png"),a=t.starSystem.primaryStar,r=t.starSystem.key||`${a.class}${a.grade}`,o=new ${d.gasClass===4?"IV/V":d.gasClass}`),...(t.starSystem.moons||[]).map(()=>"Moon")].forEach(d=>{s[d]=(s[d]||0)+1});const c=Object.entries(s).map(([d,u])=>`${u}× ${d}`).join(", "),f=JSON.stringify(t,null,2);return` ${O(r)} — Mneme Star System Map

${O(r)}

${O(a.class)}${a.grade}-class star · ${c||"No planetary bodies"}
Seed: ${t.starfieldSeed} Epoch: ${t.epoch.year}-${String(t.epoch.month).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(t.epoch.day).padStart(2,"0")} Saved: ${o.slice(0,10)}
${n?`

GM Notes

${O(n)}

a=jt(e,t,n),r=t.starSystem.key||`${t.starSystem.primaryStar.class}${t.starSystem.primaryStar.grade}`,o=r.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,"_").toLowerCase()||"system",s=new Blob([a],{type:"text/html"}),m=URL.createObjectURL(s),c=document.createElement("a");c.href=m,c.download=`mneme-2dmap-${o}.html`,document.body.appendChild(c),c.click(),document.body.removeChild(c),URL.revokeObjectURL(m);const f=i||`generated-${Date.now()}`,d={starId:f,starName:r,savedAt:new t=localStorage.getItem(`mneme-2dmap-${e}`);return t?JSON.parse(t):null}catch{return null}}function Yt(e){var n,i,a,r,o,s;const t=[];return t.push(["Field","Value"]),t.push(["Star AU",String(e.mainWorld.distanceAU)]),t.push(["Main World Mass EM",String(e.mainWorld.massEM)])),t.push(["Dwarf Planets",String(((n=e.dwarfPlanets)==null?void 0:n.length)||0)]),t.push(["Terrestrial
